category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Node.js tool for optimizing SVG vector graphics files; official site https://svgo.dev/ describes SVGO as an SVG optimizer for Node.js and CLI.
display_name_sources: Official site https://svgo.dev/ and repository https://github.com/svg/svgo use the name SVGO.
docs_sources: Official documentation domain svgo.dev has a docs section and usage page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/svg/svgo; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official docs at https://svgo.dev/docs/usage/ identify SVG optimization, Node.js, and CLI usage.
